compiled_state.author: Iso Tester

comments.author: Iso Tester
comments.body: FIXED + live-validated. Root cause was TWO layers: (1) the agentic verifier's request_limit=ceil(50/2)=25 model requests was too low (92fa needs 33); (2) the runner read self._config.max_iterations, IGNORING the per-request req.config that RunnerAgentStep scaled — so scaling never reached it (a false-green: my unit test asserted req.config, the runner reads self._config). Fix: runner.effective_max_iterations honors max(self._config, req.config) per call; RunnerAgentStep scales via with:step_budget_per_item=25/finding (carried in with: since the v3 step schema is closed); verify-failure recovery preserves Pass-1 findings (verify_failed != llm_unavailable) and fails-open unless a finding is on a blocking criterion; observability adds usage.requests -> coverage.metrics.verify_requests. LIVE: 8e6f->BLOCK, 92fa->PASS(33 req), 9df3->PASS(23 req), all verify_error=None, no INDETERMINATE. Unit: 2465 passed; make lint clean (pinned ruff).

compiled_state.description:
## Reproduction Steps
1. Run `rebar review-plan <ticket>` on a finding-rich, code-grounded ticket (its Pass-1
   findings touch a code-grounding criterion -> Pass-2 takes the AGENTIC verify branch
   `plan-review-verifier-agentic`).
2. The agentic verifier re-grounds findings via tool calls and exceeds the step budget
   (default `REBAR_LLM_MAX_STEPS=50`; runner: ~25 model requests / 50 tool calls).
3. The verify workflow step raises: `step 'review@then/verify_branch@then/verify' failed:
   agent exceeded its step budget (max_iterations=50; ...)`.

## Expected vs Actual
- **Expected:** a verify step that can't complete should DEGRADE gracefully — the kernel
  contract (`review_kernel.verify.verify_findings`) says un-verifiable findings route to
  `pass3_decide(None)` -> per-finding INDETERMINATE, SURFACED, non-blocking; the review
  still returns the Pass-1 findings. The gate's stated philosophy is fail-OPEN ("anything
  it cannot soundly check is skipped, never a false accusation").
- **Actual:** the step-budget error escapes to `gate_dispatch._run_plan_review`'s broad
  fall-through (gate_dispatch.py ~131-134) -> `_degraded_plan_review_verdict` sets
  `coverage.llm_unavailable=True` -> `finalize_verdict` returns a hollow **INDETERMINATE**
  that DISCARDS all Pass-1 findings and is **unsigned**. Fail-CLOSED: an unsigned verdict
  fails the plan-review claim gate, so a perfectly good plan **cannot be claimed**.

## Evidence
- Step 7 of threshold calibration: 3/20 reviews returned INDETERMINATE
  (8e6f-3ad2-1f24-4b8b, 92fa-6657-3579-4043, 9df3-b461-9a06-49c0). All three sidecars:
  `llm_ran=False`, `llm_unavailable=True`, identical `llm_error` = the verify step-budget
  message. Not a size issue (these are ordinary stories; 92fa's Pass-1 even produced a
  finding). The same run reviewed 17 other tickets fine with the same key/env.
- Misclassification: "verify step exceeded its agentic step budget" is bucketed with
  "LLM unavailable / no API key / no [agents] extra," which is wrong — the LLM was up and
  the finder ran.
- Recovery gap: `_recover_plan_review_coach_failure` already recovers a Pass-4 COACH
  failure (reconstructs the verdict from the decide partition). The analogous VERIFY
  failure has no recovery -> falls through to the outage path.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] A Pass-2 verify-step failure (step-budget / transient / StructuredOutputError) no
      longer sets `llm_unavailable` and no longer discards Pass-1 findings.
- [ ] Such a review surfaces its Pass-1 findings (un-verifiable ones -> per-finding
      INDETERMINATE, non-blocking) and does NOT fail the claim gate (fail-open), matching
      the kernel `verify_findings` contract + the gate's documented fail-open posture.
- [ ] Defense-in-depth: the agentic verifier's step budget is raised/scaled (e.g. with
      finding count) so it trips far less often; documented.
- [ ] A test reproduces the step-budget failure on the agentic verify branch and asserts
      the verdict is NOT a hollow INDETERMINATE (findings preserved, claim not blocked).
- [ ] (Investigate) whether the agentic verify branch over-triggers for tickets with no
      code-grounding findings (8e6f/9df3 had none in history yet ran agentic verify).
compiled_state.title: Plan-review verify-step budget exhaustion misclassified as llm_unavailable -> hollow INDETERMINATE blocks the claim
